texto: It always does seem to me that I am doing more work than I should do. It is not that I object to work
autor: it facinates me. I can sit and look at it for hours. I love to keep it by me: the idea of getting rid of it nearly breaks my heart.
explicacao: Orientação direta de it facinates me. I can sit and look at it for hours. I love to keep it by me: the idea of getting rid of it nearly breaks my heart. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “It always does seem to me that I am doing more work than I should do. It is not that I object to …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, jerome-k-jerome, always, útil em momentos de trabalho e reflexao.
